name: How much is my broken arm from work in West Valley City worth?
description: Medical + 2/3 wages + disability; get a lawyer evaluation.[2]

mainEntity.name: How much is my broken arm from work in West Valley City worth?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical + 2/3 wages + disability; get a lawyer evaluation.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Value depends on medical costs, lost wages, and disability duration—typically 66-2/3% of wages plus medical.** Utah caps permanent partial disability.[2] Key factors: No precise formula; factors include injury severity, job impact. Document bills and pay stubs, get impairment rating. Consult for accurate estimate based on your specifics.
